summary: Phase 1 Customer Interface testing completed successfully. All backend profile preferences APIs (GET/PUT /api/auth/profile) working correctly with 11/11 tests passed. All frontend features working: Profile page with event preferences (city chips, event type chips, budget range chips, notifications toggle), Dashboard with Profile quick access button and clickable avatar navigation.

backend_login.detail: POST /api/auth/login with democustomer@venulock.in returns token and user data

backend_get_profile.detail: GET /api/auth/profile returns full profile with preferences fields

backend_update_preferred_cities.detail: PUT /api/auth/profile updates preferred_cities array and persists correctly

backend_update_preferred_event_types.detail: PUT /api/auth/profile updates preferred_event_types array and persists correctly

backend_update_budget_range.detail: PUT /api/auth/profile updates budget_range string and persists correctly

backend_update_notifications_enabled.detail: PUT /api/auth/profile updates notifications_enabled boolean (true/false) and persists correctly

backend_update_all_preferences.detail: PUT /api/auth/profile updates all preferences in single request

backend_clear_arrays.detail: PUT /api/auth/profile can clear arrays to empty []

backend_empty_update_error.detail: PUT /api/auth/profile with empty body returns 400 error

frontend_dashboard_welcome.detail: Dashboard shows welcome section with user name and email

frontend_dashboard_avatar.detail: Dashboard avatar is clickable and navigates to /profile

frontend_dashboard_quick_actions.detail: Quick actions section with Browse Venues, My Favorites, My Profile buttons

frontend_dashboard_stats.detail: Stats section shows Enquiries, Saved, Viewed counts

frontend_profile_basic_info.detail: Profile page shows name, email (disabled), phone fields

frontend_profile_preferences_section.detail: Event Preferences section visible with all chip groups

frontend_city_chips.detail: City chips (Delhi, Mumbai, Bangalore, etc.) clickable and toggle selection

frontend_event_type_chips.detail: Event type chips (Wedding, Birthday, etc.) clickable and toggle selection

frontend_budget_chips.detail: Budget range chips (Under 1L, 1L-3L, 3L-5L, etc.) clickable and toggle selection

frontend_save_changes.detail: Save Changes button saves preferences and shows 'Profile saved' toast

frontend_sign_out.detail: Sign Out button logs out user and redirects to /login

frontend_my_profile_button.detail: My Profile button in quick actions navigates to /profile

critical_code_review_comments: ProfilePage.js: Well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
MyEnquiriesPage.js: Dashboard has all required data-testids for avatar, quick actions, and stats
auth.py: GET/PUT /api/auth/profile endpoints correctly handle all preference fields
ProfileUpdate model in models/__init__.py correctly defines all preference fields with Optional types
seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing customer account
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 Customer Interface fully tested. Profile page at /profile has Basic Info (name, email disabled, phone) and Event Preferences (city chips, event type chips, budget range chips, notifications toggle). Dashboard at /my-enquiries has clickable avatar and My Profile button in quick actions. All data-testids working: profile-name, profile-email, profile-phone, profile-save-btn, profile-logout-btn, notifications-toggle, chip-{city}, chip-{event-type}, budget-{range}, dashboard-avatar, action-profile, action-browse, action-favorites.
